24:15 â April 11, 2024
Update to Enterprise Fraud Management Part
The Enterprise Fraud Management Part was updated to accommodate Monitor Mode going live for wire transactions.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Enterprise Fraud Management Part
Section 1.1, Introduction to Enterprise Fraud Management
We updated this section to include direct references to wire transactions.
Section 2.2, Frequently Asked Questions
We updated the FAQ with direct references to
Interac
e-Transfer
Â®
transactions.
Section 7.2, Overview of Incidents on the Incidents Page
Section 7.6, Viewing Incidents in the Open List
We updated these sections with new screenshots and updated explanations of the navigation points of the Incidents page and Open List.
Section 8.1, Overview of Managing Transaction Alerts
We added a new screenshot of the email notification sent out for alerted or Auto Risk flagged wire transactions. We also added information about wire transactions and a new screenshot of what activity timelines look like now that Monitor Mode is available for wire transactions.
Section 8.5, Adding Manual Alerts to Unalerted Transactions
We updated this section with explanations regarding wire transactions and creating manual alerts on them.
Section 8.7, Using the Search Function
We added information to be aware of when searching for specific wire transactions.
Section 8.8, Recovery of Funds
We updated this section to include instructions for how to request for recovery of funds for wire transactions.
